category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device compliance comparison for China-to-Saudi-Arabia export.

title.en: China-to-Saudi Arabia Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (CITC / SASO)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入沙特阿拉伯：CITC/SASO合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入沙特阿拉伯：CITC/SASO合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Saudi Arabia CITC mandatory radio type approval and CITC mark requirements, SASO/SALEEM EMC conformity assessment (SASO IEC/CISPR 32 and IEC 61000-4 series), SASO/SALEEM electrical safety (SASO IEC 62368-1) including dual-voltage (127V/60Hz and 220V/50Hz) environment, Arabic labelling and Saudi authorized in-country agent requirements, and NCA IoT cybersecurity controls.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与沙特阿拉伯CITC强制无线电型式认可及CITC标志要求、SASO/SALEEM电磁兼容合格评定（SASO IEC/CISPR 32及IEC 61000-4系列）、SASO/SALEEM电气安全（SASO IEC 62368-1，含双电压127V/60Hz和220V/50Hz环境）、阿拉伯语标注及沙特境内授权代理要求，以及NCA物联网网络安全控制措施的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與沙特阿拉伯CITC強制無線電型式認可及CITC標誌要求、SASO/SALEEM電磁相容合格評定（SASO IEC/CISPR 32及IEC 61000-4系列）、SASO/SALEEM電氣安全（SASO IEC 62368-1，含雙電壓127V/60Hz和220V/50Hz環境）、阿拉伯語標注及沙特境內授權代理要求，以及NCA物聯網網路安全控制措施的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, CITC type approval, SASO/SALEEM conformity certificate, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current CITC regulations, SASO technical regulations, SALEEM program requirements, NCA cybersecurity controls, Arabic labelling rules, and Saudi market entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Saudi Arabia.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、CITC型式认可、SASO/SALEEM符合性证书、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于沙特阿拉伯销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行CITC法规、SASO技术法规、SALEEM计划要求、NCA网络安全控制措施、阿拉伯语标注规则及沙特市场准入义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、CITC型式認可、SASO/SALEEM符合性證書、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於沙特阿拉伯銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行CITC法規、SASO技術法規、SALEEM計劃要求、NCA網路安全控制措施、阿拉伯語標注規則及沙特市場准入義務。

answer_first.en: CITC (Communications, Space and Technology Commission) type approval is mandatory for all wireless and telecommunications terminal equipment imported or sold in Saudi Arabia; the CITC mark must appear on the product label in Arabic and English. SASO/SALEEM conformity assessment is required for EMC (SASO IEC/CISPR 32 and IEC 61000-4 series) and electrical safety (SASO IEC 62368-1). Saudi Arabia's dual-voltage environment (127V/60Hz and 220V/50Hz) requires universal power supply design or Arabic-language voltage labelling. A Saudi-registered in-country authorized agent is mandatory for foreign manufacturers registering with CITC and SASO. Arabic labelling is mandatory on product labels, packaging, and instructions. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and MIIT approvals are not recognized by CITC; separate CITC type approval is always required. NCA IoT cybersecurity controls are mandatory for critical sectors and expanding to consumer devices.
answer_first.zh: 沙特CITC（通信、航天与技术委员会）型式认可是进口或在沙特阿拉伯销售的所有无线电及电信终端设备的强制要求；CITC标志须以阿拉伯语和英语标注于产品标签上。SASO/SALEEM合格评定要求涵盖电磁兼容（SASO IEC/CISPR 32及IEC 61000-4系列）和电气安全（SASO IEC 62368-1）。沙特阿拉伯的双电压环境（127V/60Hz和220V/50Hz）要求采用通用电源设计或阿拉伯语电压标注。沙特注册的境内授权代理对外国制造商向CITC和SASO注册而言为强制要求。产品标签、包装和说明书强制要求阿拉伯语标注。中国SRRC、CCC及工信部审批不被CITC承认；始终需单独取得CITC型式认可。NCA物联网网络安全控制措施对关键行业为强制要求，且正在向消费类设备扩展。
answer_first.zht: 沙特CITC（通信、航天與技術委員會）型式認可是進口或在沙特阿拉伯銷售的所有無線電及電信終端設備的強制要求；CITC標誌須以阿拉伯語和英語標注於產品標籤上。SASO/SALEEM合格評定要求涵蓋電磁相容（SASO IEC/CISPR 32及IEC 61000-4系列）和電氣安全（SASO IEC 62368-1）。沙特阿拉伯的雙電壓環境（127V/60Hz和220V/50Hz）要求採用通用電源設計或阿拉伯語電壓標注。沙特注冊的境內授權代理對外國製造商向CITC和SASO注冊而言為強制要求。產品標籤、包裝和說明書強制要求阿拉伯語標注。中國SRRC、CCC及工信部審批不被CITC承認；始終需單獨取得CITC型式認可。NCA物聯網網路安全控制措施對關鍵行業為強制要求，且正在向消費類設備擴展。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
